calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses And Compliance, And For $8,235 In Monetary Sanctions Against Defendant And Her Counsel; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; And Declaration Of Anthony M. Bettencourt
Off Calendar Mar-30-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Plaintiff Quincy Lewis's Motion To Compel Further Responses And Compliance, And For $8,235 In Monetary Sanctions Against Defendant And Her Counsel is OFF CALENDAR.

On March 23, 2026, Plaintiff filed a notice of withdrawal of this motion. The motion, thus, is ordered off calendar.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses And Compliance, And For $8,235 In Monetary Sanctions Against Defendant And Her Counsel; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; And Declaration Of Anthony M. Bettencourt
Off Calendar Mar-02-2026 Continued To Mar-30-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-15-2025 Continued To Aug-03-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Aug-11-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Ms. Leung appears prior to the hearing to advise the court there is a pending substitution on file. At the court's instruction, the clerk informs counsel the matter will not be heard since the notice to contest was late and the pending document does not affect the court's tentative ruling.

No appearances in Open Court. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Before the court is a Motion to be Relieved as Counsel from Counsel Hanna Leung and Hanna Leung Professional Law Corporation, counsel of record for Plaintiff Quincy Lewis. The motion is DENIED WITH PREJUDICE.

This motion comes before the court less than two months before trial. Apparently, the breakdown in the relationship happened sometime before November 2014. The court does not understand the delay. But, more to the point, the court will not relieve counsel due to a disagreement regarding the value of the case less than two months before trial. If counsel wants to pursue this relief, she will have to secure a trial continuance first.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the court's ruling and must drop a hard courtesy copy in Dept. 302's inbox.
Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Jul-21-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Hanna Leung Professional Law Corportaion, Atty. Hanna Leung's Motion to be Relieved as Counsel for PLAINTIFF QUINCY LEWIS.

Off calendar as untimely. CCP 1005.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
